tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"American Honey" - Lady Antebellum
Chords by Joan's Genius 2010

NOTE: I think the song is in the key of C#.  An easier version would be to play in the key of C 
(C, F, G, Am). Or you can use the transposing function & lower the tab below by 1 half step. 


Intro: [ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] 


Verse 1:
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
She grew up on a side of the road[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C#[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]
Where the church bells ring and strong love grows[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]F#[/ch]
She grew up good, she grew up slow[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]
Like American honey[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#[/ch]                  [ch]F#[/ch]
Steady as a preacher, free as a weed[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Couldn't wait to get goin', but wasn't quite ready to leave[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]
So innocent, pure and sweet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]
American honey[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab]          [ch]A#m[/ch]        [ch]G#[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]     [ch]C#[/ch] 
There's a wild, wild whisper blown' in the wind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A#m[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]        [ch]G#[/ch]
Callin' out my name like a long lost friend[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A#m[/ch]        [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]C#[/ch] 
Oh I miss those days as the years go by[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A#m[/ch]                    [ch]F#[/ch] 
Oh nothing's sweeter than summertime[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
And American honey[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab]                  [ch]C#[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]
Get caught in the race of this crazy life[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]                        [ch]F#[/ch]
Tryin' to be everything can make you lose your mind[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I just wanna go back in time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
To American honey, yea[/tab]
(repeat Chorus)


Bridge:
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]              [ch]F#[/ch]
Gone for so long now[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]
I gotta get back to her somehow[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
To American honey[/tab]


(repeat Chorus)
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
And American honey[/tab]
